title: antillanthus acunae
intro: Antillanthus acunae, also known as Cuban chamomile or Hierba Buena, is a shrub-like plant native to Cuba and other parts of the Caribbean, belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Antillanthus acunae include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and menstrual cramps. Antillanthus acunae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, which are commonly used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
